# TalentBridge Workspace Instructions

- Keep the implementation aligned to the TalentBridge hiring requirements app prompt.
- Use React, Material UI, React Router, Axios, Spring Boot, and Supabase configuration.
- Preserve the clean and corporate UI direction with a fixed sidebar, spacious layout, and subtle motion.
- Keep mock auth only; do not add real auth flows.
- Make changes in small, focused steps and validate after each meaningful edit.
